title: The Big Questions Asking The Owners
section_path: The Big Questions Asking The Owners
section_path_text: The Big Questions Asking The Owners
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
Volatility
2020 has so far been the most volatile year for freight rates on record. The Capesizes in particular have seen huge swings in rates, with the market trading at opex levels for several months, followed by two $35,000/day spikes in rates. When asked about the drivers of this volatility, Stamatis Tsantanis, CEO of Seanergy Maritime Holdings, believed that this feature has not necessarily been down to weaker demand due to Covid-19, but more so because of supply disruptions.
